Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &produtosselecionados = 'lintegraprodutos_SEL' // &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Clear() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &auxProCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Produtos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ProGraEstSdo.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProstsLojInt.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = impProduto.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ProCod) Do Case Case ProGraEstSdo > 0 ProGraEstSdo.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Case ProGraEstSdo <= 0 ProGraEstSdo.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Otherwise ProGraEstSdo.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case ProstsLojInt = Status_Integrado.Integrado ProstsLojInt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case ProstsLojInt <> Status_Integrado.Integrado ProstsLojInt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise ProstsLojInt.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxProCod = ProCod &IsMarcado = false do 'IsSelecionado' EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCriarProduto' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_CriarProduto.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_CriarProduto.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_CriarProduto.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action CriarProduto' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSincronizarEstoqueValor' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_SincronizarEstoqueValor.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_SincronizarEstoqueValor.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_SincronizarEstoqueValor.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action SincronizarEstoqueValor' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProNom1.Visible = False &ProCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRONOM' &ProNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCOD' &ProCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProNom2.Visible = False &ProCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRONOM' &ProNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROCOD' &ProCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProNom3.Visible = False &ProCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRONOM' &ProNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROCOD' &ProCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRONOM' &ProNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRONOM' &ProNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action CriarProduto' If &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Count > 0 ExportaProdutosApiLojaIntegrada.Call(&sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais) Else msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro", 'Atenção! Nenhum produto selecionado. Verifique!',DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action SincronizarEstoqueValor' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRONOM' &ProNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCOD' &ProCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRONOM' AND not &ProNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCOD' AND not &ProCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRONOM' AND not &ProNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROCOD' AND not &ProCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRONOM' AND not &ProNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROCOD' AND not &ProCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Produto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event NcmCod.Click wpAjustaNCMProduto.PopUp(EmpCod, ProCod) refresh EndEvent Event TabPrc1.Click wpadicionaprodutotabela.Link('P', ProCod, TabCod, TabUltAlt, false) refresh EndEvent Event 'DoMarcarTodos' For Each Line &IsMarcado = true &IsAchou = false For &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisitem in &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais if &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisitem.ProCod = ProCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisitem = New() &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisitem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisitem.ProCod = ProCod &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Add(&sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisitem) EndIF do 'txtMarcados' EndFor do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Clear() do 'txtMarcados' Refresh EndEvent Event &IsMarcado.Click &IsAchou = false If &IsMarcado = true //TRUE For &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem in &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais if &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem.ProCod = ProCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem = New() &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem.ProCod = ProCod &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Add(&sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem) EndIF Else //FALSE For &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem in &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais if &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem.ProCod = ProCod &Index = &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.IndexOf(&sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem) &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Sub 'txtMarcados' &numeric = &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Produtos Marcados' padraoUsuario.Submit('padraoUsuario', 'G', &produtosselecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', &produtosselecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'txtMarcados' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem in &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuais If &sdtProdutosLojasVirtuaisItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &IsMarcado = true EndIf EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
